name: Crawfish Wontons
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Green onion tops, sliced thin
10 oz Can Rotel tomatoes with chiles
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter and saute onion and celery for 8 to 10 minutes or until tender.
2. Add green onion and crawfish; saute for 5 minutes.
3. Add garlic, peppers, chili powder, and cook for 1 minute.
4. Add tomatoes, cream, and chicken broth; bring just to a boil and stir in roux.
5. Cook and stir until thickened. Reduce heat to low and add cheese; stir until melted.
6. Cool in fridge for 1 hour.
7. Lay 4 wonton skins on a clean, dry surface.
8. Brush outer edges of each with beaten egg.
9. Place 1 tbsp filling in the center; fold over 4 corners of each.
10. Pinch edges together to seal. Place on wax paper and repeat with remaining skins.
11. Refrigerate until ready to fry.
12. Heat oil for deep-frying to 350°F (175°C).
13. Fry wontons, a few at a time, for 3 minutes or until golden brown.
14. Drain on paper towels and serve immediately.
